message:
fix(fcp-testkit): fix Stripe signature to avoid lossy UTF-8 and improve readiness/webhook helpers

webhook: fix stripe_signature to build signed payload as bytes directly
instead of using String::from_utf8_lossy which corrupts non-UTF8 binary
payloads. Sort imports. Expand test coverage.

readiness: rustfmt reformatting of assert_self_check_ready closure chain
and add new helper functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
